title: 有馬記念の後に・“1番”のウマ娘！

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear them, Trainer? They're calling for
me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They're all here to see me. To see the number one
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Do you think... they'll remember me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Am I finally, truly... the number one Umamusume
of all time?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tears begin to pour from Daiwa Scarlet's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deafening applause floods the Winner's Circle,
where Daiwa Scarlet stands the sole victor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She really is the number one Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right! That's enough embarrassing myself.
Everyone's waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You need to hurry up and get ready too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
For the awards ceremony, obviously! We're going
to be swamped with interview requests!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You'll need to tell them all about me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Like, "I've trained her all the way to becoming the
top Umamusume! She's my pride and joy!"

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Like, "I've trained her all the way to becoming the
top Umamusume! She's my pride and joy!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet takes me by the hand and leads me
to the awards ceremony.
